_comment: CENTRAL menu/phase config for the project workspace. Mirrors the canonical pipeline in structure/workflow-map.json (3 phases, 12 workflows). Edit this file to reorganize phases or which workflows appear under each — no code changes needed for reassigning existing items. Item ids match canonical workflow ids; a renderer in src/lib/menu.tsx binds an id to its view. Items without a renderer show a graceful 'not built yet' placeholder. This is global app config (same for every project), bundled at build, so it works online with no database.
